mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO resource_menu (
id,
create_time, update_time,
parent_id, application_id, menu_name, menu_code, link_path, icon, menu_sort_order,
delete_flag,
version ) VALUES (
#{id, jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{parentId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{applicationId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{menuName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{menuCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{linkPath, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{icon, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{menuSortOrder, jdbcType=INTEGER},
0,
0 )

INSERT INTO resource_menu (
id,
create_time, update_time,
parent_id, application_id, menu_name, menu_code, link_path, icon, menu_sort_order,
delete_flag,
version ) VALUES
(
#{item.id, jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{item.createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{item.parentId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.applicationId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.menuName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.menuCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.linkPath, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.icon, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.menuSortOrder, jdbcType=INTEGER},
0,
0 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE resource_menu
update_time = #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
application_id = #{applicationId, jdbcType=BIGINT},
menu_name = #{menuName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
menu_code = #{menuCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
menu_sort_order = #{menuSortOrder, jdbcType=INTEGER},
parent_id = #{parentId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, link_path = #{linkPath, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, icon = #{icon, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
version = version + 1
WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}

UPDATE resource_menu
update_time = #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
application_id = #{applicationId, jdbcType=BIGINT},
menu_name = #{menuName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
menu_code = #{menuCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
menu_sort_order = #{menuSortOrder, jdbcType=INTEGER},
parent_id = #{parentId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, link_path = #{linkPath, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, icon = #{icon, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
version = version + 1
WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND version = #{version, jdbcType=INTEGER}

UPDATE resource_menu
delete_flag = 1, version = version + 1
WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
AND (delete_flag = 0 OR delete_flag IS NULL)
mapper.select:
SELECT
id,
create_time, update_time,
parent_id, application_id, menu_name, menu_code, link_path, icon, menu_sort_order,
delete_flag,
version FROM resource_menu WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
AND (delete_flag = 0 OR delete_flag IS NULL)

SELECT
id,
create_time, update_time,
parent_id, application_id, menu_name, menu_code, link_path, icon, menu_sort_order,
delete_flag,
version FROM resource_menu

SELECT DISTINCT rm.id, rm.parent_id, rm.application_id, rm.menu_name, rm.menu_code, rm.link_path, rm.icon, rm.menu_sort_order FROM control_unit cu JOIN control_unit_resource_relation curr ON cu.`id` = curr.`control_unit_id` AND curr.`delete_flag` = 0 AND curr.`resource_type` = 'MENU' JOIN resource_menu rm ON curr.`resource_id` = rm.`id` AND rm.`delete_flag` = 0 WHERE cu.delete_flag = 0 AND cu.`landing` = 1 AND cu.`control_unit_scope` = 'PERPETUAL' AND cu.`status` = 'PUBLISHED' AND cu.`application_id` = #{applicationId}
